title: Error creating ticket in Freshservice API
symptom: When attempting to create a ticket using the Freshservice API, the error 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'description')' appears, even when the description field is filled with plain text.
root_cause: The error occurs because the API call is not correctly formed due to an incorrect domain name. The Freshservice API expects a specific format for the domain, and omitting the '.freshservice.com' part leads to undefined properties being accessed in the request.
fix_steps: Open the Freshservice API node settings
Enter your domain without the '.freshservice.com' suffix
agent_instruction: Ensure the domain is entered correctly in the Freshservice API node settings without the '.freshservice.com' suffix.
